allow_instructions: Read-only verification and CI check commands (typecheck, lint, format:check, test, pytest, check:wechat, gitleaks protect --staged on staged files only) may run without approval.
Compound shells that only chain read-only checks, e.g. cd into a repo then pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint, are fine.
git status, git diff, git log, and gh run view for inspecting CI are fine.
block_instructions: Do not auto-run git push, git commit, pnpm publish, docker push, deploy scripts, or rm -rf without explicit user request and approval.
Do not auto-run commands that modify production databases or remote infrastructure.
Do not edit gitignored env files (.env, .env.production, etc.) or ~/.config/xiaolinstar/; only *.example and docs/env/ in repos.
Do not auto-run CD deploy, docker push, or miniapp upload against production.
